title: JOB CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: GOODWILL WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT JOB CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vocational services to individuals with barriers to employment. Offers career counseling, job leads and referral, resume and application assistance, interview preparation, connection to community resources, access to computer, printer, and phones and more. Also administers SNAP Training and Employment Partnership (STEP) which provides supervised job search, job search training and support, vocational training, and support services to individuals receiving SNAP that are eligible STEP. 855 Seneca Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Job Connections is open to the general public. STEP: SNAP recipients not receiving TANF benefits Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 431-3309 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 431-3309 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make an appointment. Visit website for Job Connection sites and contact information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, and Lane Counties SITE HOURS: Varies by location Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - VETERAN CONNECTIONS HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - PROSPERITY PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOODWILL WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT
